title: Chevaliera rodriguesiana
taxonomy: Chevaliera rodriguesiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the island of Rodrigues in the Mascarene Islands off the coast of East Africa. The species is part of the genus Chevaliera, which consists of several plant species found in the tropical regions of the world. Chevaliera rodriguesiana is an endangered species due to habitat loss and other human activities. The plant is also known as the ' Rodrigues chevaliera' in some taxonomic classifications.
